# Grounded

> Grounded is a free, private net worth tracker that stores all financial data in the user's own Google Sheet — not on any third-party server. Users track assets, investments, crypto, property, and debt in one place and watch their net worth grow over time.

## What Grounded Does

Grounded connects to Google Drive via OAuth and creates a private Google Sheet in the user's own account. All account data, history, and snapshots are stored there. Grounded can only access files it created — nothing else in the user's Drive.

Key features:
- Track cash, investments, crypto, property, and debt accounts
- Live crypto prices via CoinGecko
- Net worth history chart with time filters
- Weekly AI-powered financial insights
- Milestone system ($1K to $1M net worth milestones)
- No backend servers, no data storage by Grounded, no subscriptions

## Privacy Model

Grounded uses Google OAuth with the `drive.file` scope — the most restrictive Drive permission available. This means Grounded can only read and write files it created itself. User financial data never touches Grounded's servers.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://usegrounded.app/): Product overview, sign in with Google, feature highlights
- [Privacy Policy](https://usegrounded.app/privacy.html): Full privacy policy explaining data handling
- [Terms of Service](https://usegrounded.app/tos.html): Terms governing use of Grounded

## Technical

- Single HTML file hosted on GitHub Pages
- Google OAuth (implicit flow) for authentication
- Data stored in user's Google Sheet (Accounts, History, Events, Meta tabs)
- AI insights powered by Claude API via Cloudflare Worker proxy
- Per-user rate limiting on AI insights via Google ID token verification
- Aggregate pageview tracking via Google Analytics — never collects financial data

- Website: https://usegrounded.app
